title: The Flesh That Heals
description: A Flesh Cleanser for The Flesh That Hates: three-tier purification machine that burns away infected blocks and hostile flesh creatures
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e446344c88ea8dffd1aae08566ec3673fd70fa36.png)

## Features
- 3 upgrade tiers: Flesh Cleanser I, II, and III
- Cleans infected blocks from *The Flesh That Hates*
- Burns and kills infected mobs inside its range
- Fuel-based operation
- Startup wave + visible cleansing radius
- Higher tiers increase range and cleaning speed
- Higher tiers reduce harmful side effects

## Progression
Each Flesh Cleanser tier improves on the previous one:
- larger purification radius
- faster infected block removal
- stronger anti-entity effect
- fewer dangerous side effects

## Notes
This mod is made as a support addon for infected-world gameplay: not to replace the threat, but to give players a way to reclaim territory.
